title: Jedi academy
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Jedi Academy}}
[[File:Jedi_Temple_TPM.png|thumb|320px|The [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] as seen in the final years of the Old Republic]]
'''Jedi academies''' were established to train [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] beings accepted into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].

==Description==
Overseen by the [[Council of First Knowledge/Legends|Council of First Knowledge]], each academy was governed by an advisory Council appointed by their superiors on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Mainstreaming the majority of teachings at the Temple, certain practices were permitted to vary from world to world. However, at all sanctioned academies, a group of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] would instruct [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiates]] to the Order in the ways of the Force. The size of the school varied from world to world: some as small as a single clan of younglings, others as large as the main academy housed within the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] of Coruscant. Many academies had been established during the [[Old Sith Wars]] and were located in the [[Galactic Rim/Legends|Galactic Rim]]. Some were located on or near Force wellsprings or places significant to the Order like [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]] caves or [[Vergence/Legends|nexuses]] of [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark-side energies]] that needed constant monitoring.<ref name="TJP">[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']]</ref> 

The terms "academy" and "enclave" were sometimes used interchangeably, though traditionally academies were educational facilities focused on training Jedi, while enclaves provided living quarters and support for fully trained Jedi. Many enclaves maintained their own local councils and, in some cases, included attached academies.<ref name=":0">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

In addition to the traditional academies established by the Order, the [[Exploration Corps/Legends|Exploration Corps]] maintained several spacefaring mobile academies such as the ''[[Chu'unthor]]'' so that roaming the galaxy and exploring new worlds could be achieved while still teaching traditional doctrine.<ref name="TJP" />

==History==
After leaving [[Tython/Legends|Tython]], the early Jedi settled on the planet [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]], which became the center of Jedi lore and teaching. Ossus remained a vital hub for the Jedi Order until it was [[Cron Supernova/Legends|devastated]] by a supernova induced by the Sith during the Great Sith War. Following the destruction of Ossus, the Jedi relocated to Coruscant, where they had already pledged themselves to the ideals and security of the Galactic Republic. There, they established a Jedi Temple and a Jedi enclave. However, the teaching of Padawans remained largely decentralized.<ref name=":1">[[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Force and Destiny'' Core Rulebook]]</ref>

During the times of the [[Jedi Civil War]], Jedi training continued to occur at academies and enclaves scattered across the galaxy. Although these institutions generally recognized the authority of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] on Coruscant, they often operated independently and promoted their own interpretations of the Force. Over the centuries, as the fortunes of the Jedi rose and fell alongside those of the Republic, many of these distant centers were destroyed, abandoned, or closed. Eventually, after the end of the [[New Sith Wars]], Jedi training and organization became increasingly centralized around the Jedi Temple on Coruscant.<ref name=":0" /> <ref name=":1" />

By the fall of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], many of the ancient academies had been shut down for decades, with the Council of First Knowledge preferring the central teachings of the Coruscant Temple. After the dissolution of the Order during the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]], all orthodox Temples and academies were routed and burned in order to prevent any more Jedi from learning the secrets of the Force. However, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] choke hold on Force-education did not last and the Order was [[New Jedi Order|reformed]] following the conclusion of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. When [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] began to expand his Order from a single class to the size of the old Order, he opened several old academies, as well as new facilities to promote growth within the Order.<ref name="TJP" />

{{Noncanonstart|legends=1}}
In an era of peace approximately 200 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]],<ref name="age">Yoda's age is given as 700 years old in [[Jedi Academy (novel)|''Jedi Academy'']]. According to [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']], Yoda was born in [[896 BBY/Legends|896 BBY]], thus placing the events of the first book in approximately [[196 BBY]].</ref> extensive facilities were in place within the Jedi Temple academy for training. These included extensive student dorms, a cafeteria, and numerous training rooms for activities such as gym class and mock [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber dueling]]. Students trained in a wide variety of subjects under Jedi Masters such as [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] and [[Garfield|Mr. Garfield]]. Visits from parents and family were occasionally permitted, and students were allowed spring and summer breaks.<ref name="jediacademy">[[Jedi Academy (novel)|''Jedi Academy'']]</ref><ref name="return">''[[Jedi Academy: Return of the Padawan]]''</ref>
{{Noncanonend}}

==List of Jedi academies==
===Pre-Great Jedi Purge===
*The [[Almas Academy]]
*The [[Arca Jeth's praxeum|Arkanian Academy]]
*The [[Bogden Jedi chapter house]]
*The ''[[Chu'unthor]]''
*The [[Chu'unthor (Clone Wars)|Second Chu'unthor]]
*The [[Culu Memorial Center]] on [[Alpheridies/Legends|Alpheridies]]
*The [[Gray Pilgrim]]
*The [[Jedi Academy (Obroa-skai)|Jedi Academy]] on [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]]
*The [[Jedi enclave (Bespin)|Jedi enclave]] on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]
*The [[Jedi Enclave]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]
*The [[Jedi enclave (Mustafar)/Legends|Jedi Enclave]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]
*The [[Masters' Retreat]] on [[Tython/Legends|Tython]]
*The [[Jedi Academy (H'ratth)|Jedi Academy]] on [[H'ratth]]
*The [[Jedi temple (Alaris Prime)|Jedi temple]] on [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]]
*The [[Jedi Temple (Tython)/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Tython/Legends|Tython]]
*The [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]
*The [[Jedi Tower]] on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]
*The [[Kamparas Jedi Training Center]]
*The [[Jedi Praxeum (Ossus)/Legends|Jedi Praxeum]] of Jedi Master [[Ooroo/Legends|Ooroo]]
*The [[School of Hidden Wisdom]] on [[Baltimn]] (Emulated Jedi teaching with few Force-sensitives)
*The [[Telosian Jedi Academy]]
*The [[Teyan Praxeum|Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Teya IV]]

===Post Great Jedi Purge===
*The [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Academy]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]
*The [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]
*The [[Jedi enclave (Corellia)|Jedi enclave]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]
*The [[Jedi Academy (Shedu Maad)|Jedi Academy]] on [[Shedu Maad]]
*The [[New Jedi Temple]]
*The First [[Hidden Temple (Arkinnea)|Hidden Temple]]
*The Second [[Hidden Temple (Sith–Imperial War)|Hidden Temple]] on [[Taivas]]
*The Jedi academy in the [[Diamond Level]] of the [[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]
